_finding: PENDING-CLEAR pin (corner 1, self-break arm): deps-empty on a NON-WM pending belief clears the bookkeeping quietly — the stated face stays a plain deletable fact ([RJ,RD], ROBS=0). CONVERGED both sides.
drl:
rule "RJ"
salience 20
when
    $t : T0(f0 == true)
then
    insertLogical(new T1("v", true));
    $t.setF0(false);
    update($t);
end
rule "RD"
salience 5
when
    $p : T1(f0 == "v", f1 == true)
then
    delete($p);
end
rule "ROBS"
when
    T1($x : f0, $y : f1)
then
end
name: ird_c2_pending_selfbreak_kill
